recommendations.title: Mickey's Trailer
recommendations.overview: Goofy's in the driver's seat, Mickey's in the kitchen, and Donald's in bed in Mickey's high-tech house trailer. When Goofy comes back to eat breakfast, leaving the car on autopilot, it takes them onto a dangerous closed mountain road. When Goofy real

recommendations.title: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
recommendations.overview: A beautiful girl, Snow White, takes refuge in the forest in the house of seven dwarfs to hide from her stepmother, the wicked Queen. The Queen is jealous because she wants to be known as "the fairest in the land," and Snow White's beauty surpasses he
recommendations.director: William Cottrell, Perce Pearce, Wilfred Jackson, Larry Morey, Ben Sharpsteen, David Hand

recommendations.title: Fantasia
recommendations.overview: Walt Disney's timeless masterpiece is an extravaganza of sight and sound! See the music come to life, hear the pictures burst into song and experience the excitement that is Fantasia over and over again.
recommendations.director: Jim Handley, James Algar, Norman Ferguson, Bill Roberts, Ben Sharpsteen, David Hand, Paul Satterfield, Wilfred Jackson, Ford Beebe Jr., Hamilton Luske, T. Hee, Samuel Armstrong

recommendations.title: Pluto's Christmas Tree
recommendations.overview: Pluto comes bounding outside to help Mickey get a Christmas tree. Chip 'n Dale see him and make fun of him, but the tree they take refuge in is the one Mickey chops down. They like the decorations, especially the candy canes and Mickey's bowl of mixe

recommendations.title: Steamboat Willie
recommendations.overview: Mickey Mouse, piloting a steamboat, delights his passenger, Minnie Mouse, by making musical instruments out of the menagerie on deck.

recommendations.title: Mickey and the Beanstalk
recommendations.overview: A mysterious thief has stolen the prosperous Happy Valley's most prized possession: the musical Singing Harp. Can Mickey, Donald, and Goofy find the answer in the irritable Willie the Giant's magnificent castle up in the blue sky?

recommendations.title: Dumbo
recommendations.overview: Dumbo is a baby elephant born with over-sized ears and a supreme lack of confidence. But thanks to his even more diminutive buddy Timothy the Mouse,  the pint-sized pachyderm learns to surmount all obstacles.
recommendations.director: Jack Kinney, Norman Ferguson, Bill Roberts, Wilfred Jackson, Samuel Armstrong, Ben Sharpsteen

recommendations.title: Pinocchio
recommendations.overview: When the gentle woodcarver Geppetto builds a marionette to be his substitute son, a benevolent fairy brings the toy to life. The puppet, named Pinocchio, is not yet a human boy. He must earn the right to be real by proving that he is brave, truthful,
recommendations.director: Norman Ferguson, Wilfred Jackson, Bill Roberts, Jack Kinney, T. Hee, Ben Sharpsteen, Hamilton Luske

recommendations.title: Chef Donald
recommendations.overview: Donald decides to try cooking along with a radio show.

recommendations.title: Plane Crazy
recommendations.overview: Referred as the actual first Mickey Mouse short. Inspired by Lindbergh's flight from New York to Paris, Mickey builds a plane to take Minnie for a trip.
